lines: Isaac sits where he can see the water court through two laundry lines.
"If this is about Noa’s school, do not ask what I permit. She is not a tool I own."

choices.label: Ask what he hopes Noa will do

questUpdate.log: Isaac wants Noa to take the school place without making his fear her duty.

lines: "She should go learn every machine they kept behind their walls, then come back only if she wants the work here."
"I also hope she stays until my hands stop shaking. Both hopes are mine to manage, not hers."

choices.label: Let the two hopes remain his

lines: "He learns the pump or finds another trade. He is not a parcel tied to Noa’s placement."
"The Compact calls him a dependent. South Measure calls him when the roof leaks."
